title: Citrusy Light Rice Krispies Stir-fry
description: A light and citrusy Australian dish featuring rice krispies in a one-pot meal that is vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to high heat.
In a medium-sized pan, melt 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the rice krispies and toast them for about 1 minute, stirring frequently.
Fold in orange zest and lemon juice into the toasted rice krispies. Stir well until evenly distributed.
If using mini chocolate chips, add them to the mixture now.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crisp. Keep an eye on it to avoid burning.
